validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'pip install uv --break-system-packages' then 'python3 -m uv'

testing_backlog.notes: Pre-existing failure: test checks for 'apm install <org/repo>' but Rich adds ANSI bold codes around < and >
Best covered by integration tests due to subprocess complexity

completed_work.description: Added 53 unit tests for GitHubTokenManager: coverage 20%->99%. Covers __init__, get_token_for_purpose (all 4 purposes, precedence, empty-string guard), validate_tokens, setup_environment (preserve_existing), _setup_copilot/codex/llm_tokens, _get_available_tokens, convenience functions. Also documented dead code in validate_tokens warning branch (line 126 unreachable).
Added 52 unit tests: core/operations.py (0%->100%, 15 tests), runtime/manager.py (17%->84%, 37 tests). Overall coverage 51%->52%.
Added 41 unit tests: registry/operations.py (6%->88%). Overall coverage 51%->52%.
Added 37 unit tests: package_validator.py (10%->100%). Also fixed UnboundLocalError bug in get_package_info_summary().
